news.title: What does it mean to make art with code? — the generative artist behind Fidenza, QQL, Incomplete Control, Day Gardens, and more — answers in our new documentary  Plus: the curation of OpenSea's QQL, by Tyler himself. Chapters: [0:00](https://x.com/opensea/status/2057506958912188642?t=0) Art Meets Community [0:37](https://x.com/opensea/status/2057506958912188642?t=37)
Joining OpenSea's Flagship Collection… QQL by — a generative algorithm open to everyone, where mint pass holders choose which seeds become permanent onchain artworks. More below

Tyler Hobbs is a visual artist and creative coder based in Austin, Texas, who works primarily with algorithms, plotters, and paint. His practice explores computational aesthetics — how the biases of modern hardware and software shape what an image can be, and how those images Welcome to the minted collection QQL #336.

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.
Crypto’s mascot. Culture on Ethereum , very interesting questions on community buildings, cults, cultures and retention of users Lot of momentum built up for 2027 & 2028. Pengu morning ✈︎
